Grid.TextBlock: COMSEVENTHFLT PEARL HARBOR HI CINCPACFLT PEARL HARBOR HI COMUSJAPAN YOKOTA AB

SECRET
1. (S) U.S. and Allied forces are under attack by Soviet, Chinese, and DPRK forces across WESTPAC. We have been ordered by the President to begin striking back immediately.
2. (S) National technical intelligence sources show multiple hostile surface groups moving towards Okinawa. Intel believes one of these units is USSR commando force with light armor embarked aboard Japanese-flagged car carrier M/V IBISHU MARU NO. 18 (see Ref.A). The other group is PLAN strike force with USSR KANIN class destroyer, apparently for air defense.
3. (S) Take charge of the Allied forces at Naha. USAF E-3A 'Darkstar' will be over Kadena AB for air and surface picture, and JMSDF P-3C will report in for targeting and maritime strike.
5. (S) SIGINT reports enemy AGI trawler is active somewhere in the area. PLAAF air units may sortie to cover the commando force, but no submarine threat is anticipated.
6. (S) Destroy both the commando force aboard M/V IBISHU MARU NO.18 and the PLAN surface strike group. Good luck and good hunting.
SECRET
DECL OADR BT
